## How we care for your dog

![Full Groom](https://smarterdog.co.uk/assets/icons/full-groom.jpg)

### Full Groom

The full works — bath, dry, brush, trim, nails, ears, the lot. They'll leave looking like a million quid and smelling even better.

Best for: first visits or long-overdue tidy-ups

![Maintenance Groom](https://smarterdog.co.uk/assets/icons/maintenance-groom.jpg)

### Maintenance Groom

Not due a full groom but looking a bit scruffy? This keeps them fresh and tidy in between.

Best for: regulars between full grooms

![De-Shedding](https://smarterdog.co.uk/assets/icons/deshedding.jpg)

### De-Shedding Package

For the fluffier breeds who like to redecorate your house with fur. A proper deep clean and undercoat blowout.

Best for: double coats and heavy shedders

![Puppy Intro](https://smarterdog.co.uk/assets/icons/puppy-intro.jpg)

### Puppy Intro

First salon visit? We take it nice and slow — no rushing, no drama. Just gentle introductions for pups under 6 months.

Best for: puppies under 6 months or nervous first-timers

![Ear Cleaning](https://smarterdog.co.uk/assets/icons/ear-cleaning.jpg)

#### Ear Cleaning

We give their ears a good clean and check for any issues. Keeps them clean, comfy, and stops nasties building up.

![Anal Gland Expression](https://smarterdog.co.uk/assets/icons/anal-gland.jpg)

#### Anal Gland Expression

Nobody's favourite topic, but sometimes it needs doing — relieves discomfort and prevents impaction. We handle it so you don't have to.

![Nail Trims](https://smarterdog.co.uk/assets/icons/nail-trim.jpg)

#### Nail Trims

Quick, stress-free nail clips. Healthier paws, fewer scratches on your floors. Everyone wins.

Post-groom care guides

## Keep that fresh groom looking great at home

Pick your coat type for a practical routine, right tools, and a recommended rebook rhythm.

Curly / DoodleDouble CoatWire / Terrier

### Best For

- Cockapoo
- Cavapoo
- Poodle mixes

Tools: **Slicker brush + metal comb**

### Home Routine

- ✓Line-brush coat 4 times weekly
- ✓Comb legs, armpits, and behind ears daily
- ✓Dry beard after meals to avoid knotting

### Rebook Rhythm

Every 6 weeks

Ask us to keep a rolling slot so your dog stays comfortable and mat-free year-round.

Set regular visits

Handmade with love

## Made for Sensitive Skin

We couldn't find products we actually wanted to use on our dogs, so we made our own. 100% natural, vegan, and properly gentle — even on the fussiest skin.

Handmade in small batches, because your dog deserves better than whatever's on offer at the supermarket.

🌱Vegan

🧴Small Batch

These are the products we actually use in the salon every day.

[Shop Houndsly →](https://houndsly.co.uk/)

### Dogs who wouldn't go anywhere else

Real words from long-time regulars, nervous pups and first-time visitors.

★★★★★4.9 on Google from local dog owners

Sandra W.

30+ years with us

"Been going to Smarter Dogs for over 30 years, they are brilliant. Sam & Liam are the best – so caring and they genuinely love the dogs they groom. Cassie is 17 now, blind and deaf, but she still loves to go and see them and always comes out looking beautiful."

Wallis

Excited every time

"Incredible groomers. Our puppy gets excited when we're near the shop, which is always a good sign! They looked after our old dog and their advice and care really improved his skin and coat. Their cuts are excellent and reasonably priced – definitely recommended."

Lindsay C.

Back after a big operation

"Thank you so much for grooming Barney today. After his big operation this year I didn't think he would cope – but he did. He smells divine and you've done a great job with him. I wouldn't go anywhere else now."

K.G.

Took a chance changing groomers

"Took a chance changing groomers and took my little Yorkie here for the first time. What a fantastic place! Definitely caring doggy lovers!!"

Kate M.

Wouldn't go anywhere else

"I wouldn't go anywhere else, other than Smarter Dogs. The staff are fantastic. I can hand on heart say not only do they do an exceptional job with the dog grooming, they genuinely care."

[See all reviews on Google →](https://g.page/r/CQJp3bxjrSfmEAE/review)

## Easy To Find

183 Kings Road, Ashton-under-Lyne, OL6 8HD

[Get directions](https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=183+Kings+Road,+Ashton-under-Lyne,+OL6+8HD)

### Typical Travel Times

Ashton-under-Lyne5 minDukinfield8 minStalybridge10 minDenton12 minMossley14 minHyde15 min

### Parking & Drop-Off

- Free street parking nearby on Kings Road and side streets.
- Easy kerbside drop-off for nervous or elderly dogs.
- Flat entrance and quick handover to keep arrivals calm.

Ready for their pamper?

### Book your visit

We're open Monday to Wednesday, 8:30am–3pm in Ashton-under-Lyne. Slots go fast — get yours booked in.

Book your visit [💬Message 07507 731487](sms:07507731487)

#### What happens next

1) Send your request

Tell us your dog, service, and best times in about 2 minutes.

2) We confirm a slot

Our Ashton team checks the diary and replies by text or call.

3) Easy drop-off

Bring them in on the day and we will handle the rest.

New to us?

We'll talk through your dog's needs first — no rush.

Already a regular?

Just tell us who you are and when you'd like to come in.

![Smarter Dog Grooming Salon](https://smarterdog.co.uk/assets/logo-text.png)

Over 40 years of happy dogs in Ashton-under-Lyne. We're not going anywhere.

[Visit our Facebook page](https://facebook.com/smarterdog)[Follow us on Instagram](https://instagram.com/smarterdog)[Watch us on TikTok](https://tiktok.com/@smarterdog)

## Opening Hours

Mon–Wed8:30am – 3:00pm

Thu–SunClosed

\\* We close on Bank Holidays but open the Thursday after instead.
